purpose: Local release-candidate route for the Firefox typed-text intake extension source package.

consumer_contract.consumer_expectation: Extension consumers select a browser_extension_package registry latest only after durable evidence promotion, source package subject materialization, and a release-consumer trust-gate allow or warn verdict over ABI, SLSA/in-toto package provenance, source repo, trust root mode, and the separate Mozilla extension signing boundary.

consumer_command: cd tools/typing/firefox-extension && zip -X -r build/abyss-machine-typing-firefox-extension-VERSION.zip manifest.json background.js content.js

abyss-machine artifacts evidence-promote BUNDLE_DIR --registry-dir REGISTRY_DIR --lifecycle-state release-ready --consumer-ref abyss-machine:browser-extension-package --evidence-ref manual-positive:browser-extension-package --source-repo abyss-machine --source-ref manifests/artifact_bundles/browser_extension_package.bundle.json --producer abyss-machine-browser-extension-packager --trust-root-mode public_release --trust-root-evidence-json @TRUST_ROOT_EVIDENCE_JSON --json

abyss-machine artifacts materialize-subjects BUNDLE_DIR --registry-dir REGISTRY_DIR --store-root SUBJECT_STORE_ROOT --manifest manifests/artifact_bundles/browser_extension_package.bundle.json --consumer-intent release_consumer --source-repo abyss-machine --trust-root-mode public_release --json

abyss-machine artifacts trust-gate --registry-dir REGISTRY_DIR --artifact-class browser_extension_package --consumer-intent release_consumer --source-repo abyss-machine --trust-root-mode public_release --subject-digest SUBJECT_DIGEST --json

abyss-machine artifacts registry-latest --registry-dir REGISTRY_DIR --artifact-class browser_extension_package --consumer-intent release_consumer --source-repo abyss-machine --trust-root-mode public_release --json
